summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Hawthorne Village Dental homepage. All 24 review-request items verified. Homepage loads without console errors; hero H1, sticky header, emergency banner, phone links, JSON-LD (3 scripts), booking dialog flow (empty->error toast, name+phone->success state + sonner toast, NO /api calls), FAQ accordion (26 items expand), section counts (8 why-cards, 4 credentials, 12 services, 8 tech, 3 gallery, 4 journey), testimonials (6 named cards), footer with correct address/phone, mobile hamburger + StickyActions all working correctly.

issues: Preferred date input uses browser-native <input type='date'> instead of shadcn Calendar component. Per design guidelines, prefer shadcn Calendar for consistent look.
10 insurer entries render as text pills (Manulife, Sun Life, etc.) rather than actual logo images. Spec called for 'insurer logos'. Consider adding SVG/image logos for premium feel.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="insurer-{name}" on the 10 insurer cards in Insurance.jsx for easier automated testing — content is present but selectors missing.
(Optional) Replace native date input in BookingDialog with shadcn Calendar/Popover for premium consistency.
(Optional) Use actual insurer logo images instead of text pills to strengthen the premium/handcrafted feel.
critical_code_review_comments: BookingDialog empty-submit toast path is gated by HTML5 required attribute — when both fields are empty, browser native validation blocks submission and the sonner toast never fires. Consider removing required (rely on JS validation) so the toast.error is actually reachable for users who bypass native validation.
Insurance.jsx iterates insurers with key={ins} (string) — safe but lacks data-testid for testability.
All interactive elements otherwise have proper data-testid coverage. Header uses data-testid="mobile-menu-toggle" (spec mentioned 'hamburger' generically — fine).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage-only MVP. Booking is client-side only — verified no /api/* requests are made on submit. All key selectors: header-book-btn, hero-book-btn, booking-dialog, booking-name, booking-phone, booking-submit, booking-close-btn, faq-item-0..25, why-card-0..7, service-card-0..11, tech-item-0..7, gallery-item-0..2, journey-step-0..3, credential-0..3, insurance-feature-0..2, sticky-actions, mobile-menu-toggle. Insurance logos lack data-testid but 10 items render correctly.
